'''鈭歳-n-l-ng''' ('''karanlengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lakescape|lakescape]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lakescape|lakescape]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-n-l-ng
|-
! Lemma
| karanlengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiranlengoko|thiranlengoko]] || [[word:jiranlengoko|jiranlengoko]] || [[word:shiranlengoko|shiranlengoko]] || [[word:kiranlengoko|kiranlengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuranlengoko|thuthuranlengoko]] || [[word:jujuranlengoko|jujuranlengoko]] || [[word:shushuranlengoko|shushuranlengoko]] || [[word:kukuranlengoko|kukuranlengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuranlengoko|thuranlengoko]] || [[word:juranlengoko|juranlengoko]] || [[word:shuranlengoko|shuranlengoko]] || [[word:kuranlengoko|kuranlengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuranlengoko|thuranlengoko]] || [[word:juranlengoko|juranlengoko]] || [[word:shuranlengoko|shuranlengoko]] || [[word:kuranlengoko|kuranlengoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoranlengoko|thothoranlengoko]] || [[word:jojoranlengoko|jojoranlengoko]] || [[word:shoshoranlengoko|shoshoranlengoko]] || [[word:kokoranlengoko|kokoranlengoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoranlengoko|thoranlengoko]] || [[word:joranlengoko|joranlengoko]] || [[word:shoranlengoko|shoranlengoko]] || [[word:koranlengoko|koranlengoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoranlengoko|thoranlengoko]] || [[word:joranlengoko|joranlengoko]] || [[word:shoranlengoko|shoranlengoko]] || [[word:koranlengoko|koranlengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ranlengoko|th忙ranlengoko]] || [[word:j忙ranlengoko|j忙ranlengoko]] || [[word:sh忙ranlengoko|sh忙ranlengoko]] || [[word:k忙ranlengoko|k忙ranlengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharanlengoko|thatharanlengoko]] || [[word:jajaranlengoko|jajaranlengoko]] || [[word:shasharanlengoko|shasharanlengoko]] || [[word:kakaranlengoko|kakaranlengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharanlengoko|tharanlengoko]] || [[word:jaranlengoko|jaranlengoko]] || [[word:sharanlengoko|sharanlengoko]] || [[word:karanlengoko|karanlengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharanlengoko|tharanlengoko]] || [[word:jaranlengoko|jaranlengoko]] || [[word:sharanlengoko|sharanlengoko]] || [[word:karanlengoko|karanlengoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
